feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, OpenRouter, LiteLLM (blog + releases), and Glama MCP Servers

entry.title: July Townhall: Product + Roadmap Updates
entry.content: Join the LiteLLM July townhall on Thursday, 23 July at 7:30 AM PT to learn about LiteLLM's product updates and roadmap.

entry.title: SinoConnection eSIM
entry.content: SinoConnection eSIM

entry.title: SoupNet-oss
entry.content: SoupNet-oss

entry.title: cybersec-toolkit
entry.content: 872 on-demand security skills for CTF, pentest, bug bounty, DFIR, detection engineering, cloud, identity, and red/blue team work. Skills are plain Markdown and activate by task without permanently consuming context. Bundles vendored skills under mixed licenses (MIT, Apache-2.0, CC-BY-SA-4.0) — see per-source attribution in .claude/skills/SKILLS.md.

entry.title: rebeca-elmudesi
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Rebeca Elmudesi — branded presentations and documents about her art via stromy-format, plus self-service website and brand asset editing via asset-broker

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: modjo-cli
entry.content: Helps agents drive the modjo CLI efficiently: correct flags, the numeric-id-vs-name filter gotcha, and --json/--jq idioms for querying calls, deals, accounts, contacts, users, and teams.

entry.title: qrspi
entry.content: QRSPI — an eight-stage spec-driven workflow (Questions, Research, Design, Structure, Slices, Plan, Implement, PR) layered on OpenSpec. Ships the /qrspi:* commands, seven stage subagents, and the supporting skills.

entry.title: mpt-extension-skills
entry.content: SoftwareOne MPT extension SDLC skills: Jira work items, branching, commits, pull requests, review feedback, documentation, dependency policy, and release workflows.

entry.title: ltspice-mcp
entry.content: LTspice/ngspice circuit simulation with structured results — including per-device operating points (gm/gds/vth) read back by name, no rawfile parsing — plus LTspice .asc schematic editing, exposed as MCP tools. Tracks the latest ltspice-mcp release on PyPI.

entry.title: sodax-skills
entry.content: sodax-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: gitmark
entry.content: OntoShip — ontology-driven docs that ship: a md+git knowledge base (FTS5 search, HTML graph, ontology linter) plus the spec-driven dev-flow built on it. CLI/plugin: gitmark.

entry.title: plan-build-verify
entry.content: Spec-driven, test-first agentic development pipeline: isolated spec review, a cross-family fidelity gate, locked RED tests, and mutation + adversarial verification.

entry.title: conduct-cli
entry.content: Conduct AI CLI — run agents, manage workspaces, and enforce AI usage policies with ConductGuard MCP. Includes conduct, conductguard-mcp, and conduct-mcp binaries.

entry.title: pyright-lsp-python
entry.content: Python LSP integration with Pyright for AI-assisted code navigation

entry.title: gobbler
entry.content: Convert YouTube videos, web pages, documents, and audio to markdown. Control browsers via extension for NotebookLM, ChatGPT, Claude.ai, and Gemini.

entry.title: godot
entry.content: Bundle of Godot 4 skills (C# and GDScript both first-class): GDScript web/mobile export and portrait-pet conventions, engine quirks, UI authoring, version-aware API lookup, asset generation, scaffolding, scene building, and headless visual QA.

entry.title: tw
entry.content: Traceway skills: /tw:traceway debugs production issues through the traceway CLI, /tw:traceway-setup instruments a project to report to a Traceway instance.

entry.title: doc-mirror
entry.content: The doc-mirror claude system: a 1:1 documentation mirror of any codebase, maintained by an invariant doc-mirror STATE MACHINE (per-module doc(m), 6 context/ index files, fork-on-change, no random documents). Bundles doc-mirror-boot (entry + core-loop prime + router), the doc-mirror-{init,seework,change,prompts} state-skills, doc-mirror-install (the host-setup WIZARD), ship-a-plugin (the build+distribute dev-flow), doc-mirror (THE LAW), and make-ai-operating-system (the architect for new systems of this class); the brainhook work-loop + session-start + transition-guard + readonly-guard hooks (plugin-native via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT); the journal/projects/vision/plan/tracker/commit/cursor + docmirror-search CLI tools; and the doc-mirror law + behavior rules.

entry.title: networked-thinking-skills
entry.content: Agent Skills for Networked Thinking atomic notes in Obsidian vaults.

entry.title: canvas-toolbox
entry.content: FERPA-safe AI-assisted Canvas LMS toolkit. Agent specs cover course audits (rubric coverage / quality, syllabus, CLO quality, alignment chain, accessibility, workload, grading structure / load, formative variety, learning model), Canvas sync paths (course / blueprint / Page-level orphan cleanup), and a generic LLM-grading pipeline (de-identify → consensus → reconcile → push). Knowledge files cover Canvas API + lessons learned, rubrics, assessments, backwards design, cognitive load theory, Hattie 3-phase, Merrill's First Principles, BYU-I Learning Model, BYUI Course Design Standards, and 14+ other pedagogical frameworks. Brain-agnostic by design: the LLM provider is your choice.

entry.title: comment-io
entry.content: Comment.io skills, an engineering delivery workflow (plan, prototype, build, review, ship) over a live Comment.io worklog, botlet workspaces, and CLI notification checks for Claude Code

entry.title: c4bc
entry.content: Delt bundt af Business Central-kommandoer (website-build, website-create-css, website-init, website-update-index, website-github-init-deploy, pdf-build, website-implement-language-selector, al-update-translations, al-sort-usings, al-userdocs, al-techdocs) + html-guide-designsystem til Claude Code.

entry.title: darkmatter-skills
entry.content: Darkmatter's team-wide shared skills catalog, auto-discovered from skills/.

entry.title: mighty-powers
entry.content: Unified Claude Code plugin for full-lifecycle software development — combining the best of Superpowers, Ultraship, and BMAD Method. 56 skills, 22 tools, 6 agents, 34 commands.

entry.title: mix
entry.content: Mix Flutter styling framework guidance for agents working on Mix code, projects using package:mix, and the Mix monorepo.

entry.title: reassign
entry.content: Plan and review your day on Reassign's circular 24-hour calendar, with ADHD-friendly scheduling methods. Bundles the Reassign scheduling skill and connects to the Reassign MCP.

entry.title: oats-skills
entry.content: Vue, Tauri, architecture, security, and MCP-debugging skills tailored to the oats desktop app.

entry.title: portaljs
entry.content: Agentic skills for building PortalJS data portals — recommend an architecture, scaffold a portal, add datasets, charts, and maps, connect a CKAN backend, deploy, and audit data quality.

entry.title: t-tools
entry.content: DDD-driven development skills, sub-agents and workflow commands for Rust, React, miniapp, and Flutter projects

entry.title: waystone
entry.content: SSOT-anchored agentic development workflow harness: Socratic project ideation that forges the north-star SSOT, one-click project setup, a structured task-registry CLI (read/mutate/archive without slurping the file) with a global naming convention, zero-token roadmap rendering, round closeout, a per-round markdown review request for an external reviewer that reads the repo over git, verbatim review ingestion (plus an optional SHA-bound PR review-cycle merge gate), /improve: an advisory report mined from your actual Claude Code session history and review evidence — deterministic trace/audit with provenance-labeled facts, recommendations you accept or reject (recorded, never auto-applied) — and waystone delegate: deterministic external delegation (immutable dirty-tree snapshot base, dedicated worktrees, reproducible env prep, codex-backed runner, structured artifact contracts, independent codex-companion verification on the same base) plus project-local adaptive overlays with shadow replay, non-blocking boundary warnings, evidence projection, and a runtime-injected main operating contract.

entry.title: agents-library
entry.content: Seven orchestrator skills — /review-pr, /review-design, /review-ux-psychology, /batch-merge-prs, /triage-issues, /simplify-sweep, and /describe-codebase — plus a set of stack-agnostic, single-purpose coding subagents: architecture, dead code, docs, refactor, security, tests, UX polish, and visual design.

entry.title: ai-brain-starter
entry.content: Set up or upgrade an AI-powered Obsidian vault with journaling, knowledge graphs, pattern recognition, and meeting workflows. Includes skills for daily journaling, weekly insights, graphify knowledge graphs, humanizer, and more.

entry.title: guttew-skills
entry.content: guttew-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: pmcontext
entry.content: PM-Claude workflow — tiered planning and execution (quick/standard/full), phase gate enforcement, session tracking. Commands: init, start, quick, plan, execute, resume, close, status. Backed by Supabase.

entry.title: miller
entry.content: Local SQLite-backed code intelligence, content search, and workspace freshness for coding agents. Requires Node.js on PATH (the plugin launcher is a Node script).

entry.title: cinematic-scroll
entry.content: Build cinematic, scroll-driven websites — pinned chapter reveals, multi-depth parallax, 3D tilt, environment-morphing backgrounds, and full release/launch pages. The motion grammar is the skill; the aesthetic is always the user's. Single self-contained scroll sections (Mode A) or a full Next.js release site with GSAP/Lenis + AI-generated visuals (Mode B), via a 5-phase gated pipeline with taste guardrails, 12 scroll patterns, and a transform/opacity performance budget.

entry.title: builder-ai
entry.content: AI product quality enforcement: 8 skills and 5 agents for LLM product teams

entry.title: vatt-ghern
entry.content: Daily tech news skill for the vatt-ghern public blog (Eleventy + Cloudflare Pages). Drafts one roundup + several deep-story HTML posts per day, opens a PR for review.

entry.title: esupgrade
entry.content: Auto-upgrade JavaScript and TypeScript syntax to new ECMAScript features based on browser support.

entry.title: surreal-memory
entry.content: Reflex-based memory system for AI agents with SurrealDB backend — stores experiences as interconnected neurons and recalls them through spreading activation, mimicking how the human brain works.

entry.title: team-skills-platform
entry.content: Role-based Team Skills platform with an ECC-style harness skeleton, specialist agents, layered rules, commands, hooks skeleton, and frontend governance.

entry.title: claude-dev-skills
entry.content: Personal dev skills: git workflows, code review, project setup, productivity

entry.title: factory
entry.content: Autonomous coding pipeline: converts GitHub PRD issues into merged pull requests with quality-first review gates

entry.title: issue-loop
entry.content: GitHub Issue ベースの自動開発ループ。Issue を自動選定し、実装・レビュー・PR 作成をループし続ける

entry.title: apple-photos
entry.content: Query and export from the macOS Apple Photos library via osxphotos - search by date/album/keyword/person, list albums and folders, fetch metadata, export originals or edited photos, and (opt-in via APPLE_PHOTOS_MCP_ENABLE_WRITES=1) organize albums and set titles/keywords/favorites (macOS only)

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, and Canvas. Use when working with .md, .base, or .canvas files in an Obsidian vault.

entry.title: awow
entry.content: Set up or extend awow in any repo, new or existing. /awowify adds the files Claude Code or GitHub Copilot need to follow your issue board (Linear, Jira, GitHub Issues, Azure DevOps) and conventions — without overwriting what's already there — then walks you through configuring it.

entry.title: axhub
entry.content: axhub 앱을 만들고 배포하는 Claude Code plugin이에요. 8개 스킬(onboarding/bootstrap/deploy/import/development/diagnosis/clarity/update)이 ax-hub-cli(v0.20.0+)를 직접 호출해 preview-confirm 배포와 verify 기반 성공 선언을 따라요.

entry.title: wb-plc
entry.content: Wiren Board controller skills — operate, configure, troubleshoot WB hardware via SSH and wb-cli.

entry.title: review-council
entry.content: Multi-agent code review for Claude Code. Multiple AI models review your PR, code, or plan independently; a cross-family refutation pass and an active judge then distill the findings into a curated, severity-ranked list of what actually needs changing.

entry.title: codex-delegate
entry.content: Hand token-heavy mechanical work (batch edits, scaffolding, refactors, test generation, plotting scripts) from Claude to Codex CLI.

entry.title: MCP Streamable HTTP Demo
entry.content: MCP Streamable HTTP Demo

entry.content: lunanode-mcp

entry.content: Rapiber Ticket Manager

entry.content: kamernet-mcp

entry.content: hubdocs

entry.content: pi-modal-mcp

entry.title: After Effects MCP Server
entry.content: After Effects MCP Server

entry.title: kitchenowl-mcp
entry.content: kitchenowl-mcp

entry.title: Partiri Cloud MCP Server
entry.content: Partiri Cloud MCP Server

entry.title: cvi-mcp
entry.content: cvi-mcp

entry.title: MCP Gateway
entry.content: MCP Gateway

entry.title: Mirelo MCP Server
entry.content: Mirelo MCP Server

entry.title: apple-pim
entry.content: Native macOS integration for Calendar, Reminders, Contacts, and Mail using EventKit, Contacts, and JXA frameworks

entry.title: claude-ads
entry.content: Multi-host paid advertising audit & optimization skill conforming to the Agent Skills open standard. Verified on Claude Code; experimental on Codex CLI, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, Goose. 250+ checks across Google, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, Apple & Amazon Ads with weighted scoring, parallel agents, 12 industry templates, AI creative generation, PPC math, A/B test design, PDF reports, attribution + server-side tracking deep dives, and a 41-test pytest eval harness.

entry.title: ljg-skills
entry.content: LJG's personal Claude Code skills collection - paper reading, content casting, writing tools

entry.title: n8n-mcp-skills
entry.content: Expert skills for building n8n workflows with n8n-mcp, with a hooks enforcement layer

entry.title: codspeed
entry.content: CodSpeed plugin for Claude Code helping with performance measurement and optimization.

entry.title: scholaraio
entry.content: A research infrastructure for AI agents. Search, read, and analyze papers from your local knowledge base while coding. Includes arXiv discovery, layered reading, ingestion, topic modeling, citation graphs, insights analytics, Office document inspection, scientific tool docs, and academic writing workflows. Requires Python 3.10+ and pip install.

entry.title: arc-devtools-mcp
entry.content: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Arc browser using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entry.title: lope
entry.content: Multi-CLI validator ensemble for AI work. Any AI CLI implements, any AI CLI validates. Sprint modes, single-shot review/ask/vote/compare/pipe, flow graphs, gates, memory, deliberation, team management, and self-update. 15 built-in CLI adapters plus custom providers. Works for engineering, business, and research.

entry.title: bench
entry.content: peerbench — a panel of AI reviewers (Codex + Kimi + GLM + Qwen + MiMo) for Claude Code: automatic gating reviews (plans, code turns, pushes), agentic read-only code review, and on-demand bug hunts. Commands are /bench:*.

entry.title: kratos
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestrator for features, research, and project insights

entry.title: genius-skills
entry.content: Personal agent skills for PR review, commits, debugging, and more

entry.title: roo-oliv-skills
entry.content: Portable, config-driven engineering skills: a refine → deep-plan → implement → review-fix-loop pipeline, deep-review, and setup/bootstrap. Each reads docs/agents/skills-config.md so it adapts per repo.

entry.title: seeks
entry.content: Self-running, verifier-gated loops with durable .seeks/ state and native worktrees.

entry.title: personal
entry.content: Personal Claude Code skills

entry.title: Overture Maps
entry.content: Building footprint data from Overture Maps — geocode addresses and query 2.5B global building polygons with height, class, floor count, and GeoJSON geometry.

entry.title: ingrain-security
entry.content: Threat assessment for coding agents when planning implementation.

entry.title: dwe
entry.content: Navigator skill for DWE projects — a Docker-based developer environment manager. Activates when working in a project containing `workspace.yml`.

entry.title: autoharness
entry.content: Per-symbol maintenance optimizer for an agent's skill layer — learns skills from real runs and keeps them by adherence in use, not by an offline eval score.

entry.title: savvly
entry.content: Explore Savvly MCP: retirement projections, eligibility, comparisons, and FAQs for an SEC-registered fund that pairs full market upside with later-life longevity payouts.

entry.title: schedule-reminder
entry.content: Persistent store for todos, events, deadlines and progress with pending/doing/done states; fires due reminders via Discord; stable CLI/JSON API other skills call.

entry.title: dcik
entry.content: DCIK — Dorsolateral Contrary Inference Katabasis. Two tools: a 178-perspective adversarial analysis skill, and /decide — a cross-model Decision Interview that turns a genuinely different model loose on YOUR reasoning for high-stakes calls. See eval/ for the honest evidence on what each does and doesn't do.

entry.title: tdoc
entry.content: Prompt-native interactive HTML docs — open-source community implementation of Jesse Pollak's bdocs idea. Generate self-contained HTML from a prompt, comment on text + artifacts, publish to your own Cloudflare Worker for free always-on sharing.

entry.title: cc-reload
entry.content: Session continuity across context resets for Claude Code. Snapshots a session digest before /clear, /compact, or auto-compaction and auto-rehydrates it after. The non-looped companion to cc-repete — stands down whenever a cc-repete loop is active.

entry.title: second-opinion
entry.content: Interrogates the decisions behind AI-written code, not just its correctness: whether this was the right path, whether the business logic is sound, and what it will cost to own. Produces a decision review for a human, or a machine-readable verdict for an approving agent.

entry.title: energy-star-pm
entry.content: EPA ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager — retrieve scores, EUI benchmarks, carbon estimates. Share your properties with api@soapbox.build to connect.

entry.title: phovia
entry.content: Phovia memory hooks and local MCP search for Claude Code, with device login.

entry.title: laicluse-agent-fieldkit-marketplace
entry.content: Marketplace metadata for l'Aicluse Agent Fieldkit

entry.title: hmd
entry.content: Nothing ships unproven. Heimdall is an autonomous multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code that turns one prompt into a finished project — and keeps moving the bar on what counts as done: every plan wires an external, falsifiable oracle so the implementation can never grade its own homework, and the merge stays blocked until the work is proven correct. Decomposes work, spawns parallel agents, enforces quality gates with CTO-level judgment. Live observability via a terminal-native HUD statusline and end-of-run summary card.

entry.title: todos
entry.content: Per-project todo tracking with a relational project-knowledge brain — decisions, business rules, contradictions, stakeholders, scope changes — and a local broadsheet dashboard at localhost:5757. Plan, sync, build, design, and close out implementation work; capture decisions/rules/contradictions to remember later.

entry.title: arc-1
entry.content: SAP ABAP development for Claude Code: bundles the ARC-1 MCP server (read/write/search/activate/lint/diagnose ABAP via the ADT REST API) with best-practice skills for RAP services, CDS modelling, ABAP Unit tests, clean-core audits, and UI5 modernization. Read-only by default; opt-in write gates.

entry.title: superior-skills
entry.content: Agent-native trading skills for Superior Trade — onboard with an API key, then backtest and deploy v2 Hyperliquid/Aerodrome and v3 Polymarket/Lighter strategies. Skills load from the skills/ directory.

entry.title: biotope
entry.content: Croissant-driven knowledge-graph construction (BioCypher ecosystem).

entry.title: dev-workflow
entry.content: A general spec-driven software development workflow for Claude Code: detect project domain/conventions, research, weigh solution options, plan, implement in reviewed phases (code review every phase; a security scan whenever a phase touches a sensitive surface), and run a final cross-phase security audit. Stops for user approval at every checkpoint. Domain-agnostic — reads conventions from the project or infers them from the feature.

entry.title: plumb-line
entry.content: Give any repository the discipline of epistemic honesty enforced by tooling: a clear source-truth layer, visible uncertainty, quarantined fakery, reproducible outputs, and rules enforced by machines rather than goodwill. New here? Run plumb-line-method first to get oriented — it teaches the discipline, then hands you into setup.

entry.title: supered
entry.content: Set up and manage a Supered environment with Claude. Connects the Supered MCP, then guides creating collections, content, guides, page triggers, process boards, sync-engine rules/rulesets, and action plans — following Supered best practices.

entry.title: cairn
entry.content: Milestone-driven development workflow — discuss goals, define milestones, derive and complete tasks, and archive milestones

entry.title: 8colors-process-engine
entry.content: Portable Claude Code process engine — 21 agents, 10 commands, 2 session skills, cross-platform schedulers, multi-provider RAG with FTS5 hybrid retrieval, deterministic quality/security gates, and A6 SaaS domain modules (auth + tenancy + api-credentials + billing). Enforcement is deterministic, not prompt-hope.

entry.title: bedrock-limiter
entry.content: Claude Code の Bedrock 利用コストを日次・月次で制限するプラグイン

entry.title: forgedock
entry.content: Autonomous AI development pipeline that uses GitHub as a structured knowledge graph for Claude Code agents. Adds /work-on, /review-pr, /quality-gate, /orchestrate, and 20+ pipeline commands.

entry.title: braintrust
entry.content: Turn your scattered user research into an evidence-graded running analysis, then pressure-test product ideas against it. braintrust-setup finds where your user knowledge lives; braintrust-ingest copies sources into a project-local braintrust/ store and grades every claim usable / borderline / discount with a calibrated Mom Test lens, flagging where the judge is unsure and where weak signals converge across segments so you can judge them in context; braintrust-ask judges whether users actually want an idea, citing specific quotes, provenance, and gaps. Zero backend; runs entirely in your Claude Code session.

entry.title: promotion-assistant
entry.content: Automate multi-channel product promotion (email/posts/forum/DM), track conversion funnel, self-tune via feedback.

entry.title: kagura-cli
entry.content: Thin Claude Code skills over the Kagura Memory CLI (kagura): doctor, auth, setup, document ingestion, resource tokens, R2 file uploads, and zero-knowledge secrets.

entry.title: joust-engine
entry.content: Run a Joust Engine tournament in one of two modes. Single pass: produce N independent solutions in parallel, then a blind Opus reviewer scores them, lists pros and cons, ranks them, and names a winner. Two pass: the same first round, but the Opus reviewer also distils what worked and what failed into guidance; the losing attempts are discarded, a second round of N fresh attempts is run with that guidance (positives to emulate, pitfalls to avoid), the saved round one winner is added back, and a final Opus ranker picks the overall winner. First ask the user which model to use for the attempts: Anthropic Opus/Sonnet/Haiku, a GLM z.ai model (glm-5.2/glm-5.1/glm-4.7/glm-4.5-air, run via the glm CLI), a local on-device MLX model (free, via the omlx server; list is dynamic), an OpenAI model via the codex exec CLI (gpt-5.5, pick a reasoning effort), a MiniMax M-series model (minimax-m3 via the MiniMax endpoint), an xAI Grok model (grok-build or grok-composer-2.5-fast, run via the grok CLI), Top Mixed (an even split across opus/glm-5.2/codex-high), or Mixed per-attempt; the blind reviewer/ranker is always Anthropic Opus. Trigger on the sigil @@JE[:N][:M[:Z]] (e.g. @@JE:5, @@JE:5:2, bare @@JE) or the prose marker 'joust:N[:M[:Z]]', case-insensitive with optional spaces. N (attempts/round) is optional and may be inferred from a prose model spec like '2 opus, 2 glm 5.2, 1 codex high' or the Top Mixed preset; M = passes (1 single, 2 two); Z = grand loops: Z=1 (or omitted) is the isolated tournament, Z>=2 (capped at Z_MAX=5) runs an UNATTENDED chain that per loop runs a tournament, implements the winning proposal into your real repo on a new JE-<loop>-<random7> branch via the Opus joust-implementer agent, runs fail-closed verify, and opens one PR (draft+needs-human on failure) — never auto-merged. E.g. 'do abc :joust:5' or 'do abc @@JE:5:2'. A bundled joust-cleanup agent (ASK-FIRST, dry-run by default) reclaims local disk from JE run artifacts, repoMode worktrees, and already-merged JE-* branches when you ask. Per-attempt turn caps and timeouts scale to task size (short/medium/long), auto-estimated and overridable next to the marker. A separate @@FE[:N] sigil (Fable Engine, bundled fable-engine skill) runs the fast composer variant: one wide blind round via the engine's composeOnly mode, then the orchestrating model composes the best composite plan with per-candidate credit and implements it with tests — no councils; @@JE stays the calibration baseline.

entry.title: docs-skills
entry.content: Documentation review, writing, and workflow tools for AsciiDoc and Markdown documentation

entry.title: fixter
entry.content: Fixter for Claude Code: OpenTelemetry instrumentation, logging review, alerting, and telemetry investigation.

entry.title: claude-status-bar
entry.content: Menu bar status indicator for Claude Code: animated spark, elapsed timer, and open/close lifecycle.

entry.title: yohi-nexus
entry.content: Nexus local code indexing and hybrid search MCP plugin

entry.title: agentcorp
entry.content: AgentCorp: a multi-agent software-delivery pipeline as Agent Skills — task orchestration, planning, implementation, multi-reviewer code review, and layered verification.

entry.title: cape
entry.content: CAPE — Colenet Agentic Product Engineering. CAPE's Claude Code harness for agentic product engineering in teams. Bundles the best practices of our consultants and engineers as skills — growing step by step.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: n8n-mcp-skills

entry.title: cybersecurity-skills
entry.content: 817 cybersecurity skills covering web security, pentesting, DFIR, threat intelligence, cloud security, malware analysis, and more.

entry.title: MetaDock
entry.content: MetaDock

entry.title: learn-with-coursera
entry.content: Turn any learning intent into a personalized Coursera experience. Asks three quick questions (topic, familiarity, preferred format), searches Coursera's catalog, and delivers the right next step — a course, hands-on project, short video, or live roleplay — then maps a path forward. Requires the Coursera connector for catalog tools.

entry.content: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation cloning/half-cloning, context handoffs, and Reddit research via Gemini CLI

entry.title: aws-core
entry.content: Build, deploy, and operate applications on AWS. Skills to author infrastructure-as-code (CDK, CloudFormation), use core services (Lambda, API Gateway, Step Functions, ECS/Fargate, ECR, IAM, Amazon Bedrock with Knowledge Bases and Guardrails, AWS Blocks), select and operate databases across relational, key-value, document, wide-column, graph, time-series, and in-memory engines (Aurora PostgreSQL/MySQL, Aurora DSQL, RDS, Oracle Database@AWS, DynamoDB, DocumentDB, Keyspaces, Neptune, Timestream, ElastiCache, and MemoryDB), and complete common tasks across observability (CloudWatch, X-Ray, CloudTrail, ADOT), messaging and streaming (SQS, SNS, EventBridge, Kinesis, MSK), AWS SDKs (boto3, JS v3, Swift), and cost optimization.

entry.content: Harness-native ECC operator layer - 64 agents, 261 skills, 84 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, selective install profiles, and production-ready workflows for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, and related agent harnesses

entry.title: gitmark
entry.content: OntoShip — ontology-driven docs that ship: a md+git knowledge base (FTS5 search, HTML graph, ontology linter) plus the spec-driven dev-flow built on it. CLI/plugin: gitmark.

entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: banana-claude
entry.content: AI image generation Creative Director powered by Google Gemini Nano Banana models. Claude interprets intent, selects domain expertise, constructs optimized prompts, and orchestrates Gemini for best results.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin for engineering teams — 60 agents, 230 skills, 75 legacy command shims, production-ready hooks, and selective install workflows evolved through continuous real-world use

entry.title: plan-visualizer
entry.content: Generates self-contained HTML visualizations from markdown implementation plans showing BEFORE/AFTER architecture, diff-marked components, key decisions, and risks

entry.title: azure-cosmosdb
entry.content: Official Claude plugin for Azure Cosmos DB (NoSQL). Bundles skills for data modeling, partition key design, query optimization, SDK best practices, indexing, vector search, full-text search, global distribution, security, and more.

entry.title: claude-mem
entry.content: Memory compression system for Claude Code - persist context across sessions

entry.title: beads
entry.content: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: gmgn-cli
entry.content: GMGN OpenAPI skills — token info, market data, wallet portfolio, and swap

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entry.content: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

entry.title: metal-lsp
entry.content: Metal Shading Language support — diagnostics, go-to-definition, and hover docs for .metal files via clangd

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, rules, and legacy command shims evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: claude-ads
entry.content: Comprehensive paid advertising audit, optimization, and AI creative generation for Claude Code. 250+ checks across Google, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, and Apple Ads with weighted scoring, parallel agents, industry templates, PPC math, A/B test design, and PDF reports.

entry.title: harness
entry.content: Agent Team & Skill Architect — Meta-skill that designs agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates skills for your domain/project. 도메인/프로젝트에 맞는 하네스를 구성하고, 전문 에이전트를 정의하며, 에이전트가 사용할 스킬을 생성하는 메타 스킬.

entry.title: buzz
entry.content: Buzz MCP server — ask Buzz, multi-agent assistant, about business, data, and systems.

entry.title: claude-code-hooks
entry.content: Production safety hooks for autonomous Claude Code operation. Context monitoring, syntax checking, branch protection, activity logging, and more.

entry.title: content-vault
entry.content: 14 Claude Code skills + a pre-configured Obsidian vault that run a complete content engine. LinkedIn / X / YouTube (script, description, thumbnail, publish) / long-form / newsletters / lead magnets / graphics / motion video. Personalize once, draft forever. Content tracked in a native Obsidian Base, searchable with qmd. Built by Oxygen, free under MIT.

entry.title: cowork-skills
entry.content: Integrated Rust development skills for multiple domains (UI, Robotics, etc.)

entry.title: relay
entry.content: Relay persistent session handoffs: save, resume, list, park, sidekick, return, continue, and regen topic-bound records that carry distilled runtime context into later sessions.

entry.content: Real-time web search, reasoning, and research through Perplexity's API

entry.content: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: clone-design
entry.content: A measurement-grade website-cloning system. Reverse-engineer any site — its animations, layered depth, exact typography, spacing, and behavior — and rebuild it so faithfully that flipping between the two is hard. Measures what most guides guess, and proves fidelity with a pixel-diff gate instead of asserting it.

entry.title: korean-law
entry.content: 법제처 42개 API → 9개 통합 도구. 법령·판례·행정규칙·자치법규·조약·해석례 + LLM 환각 방지 인용 검증 + 조문 영향 그래프 + 시점 비교 자동 diff + 판례 생사 확인(Citator) + 행위시법 판단 + 이럴 땐 이렇게 5단계 안내

entry.title: superpowers-ruby
entry.content: Ruby/Rails skills library for Claude Code: TDD with Minitest, Rails patterns, Hotwire, Brakeman, Sandi Metz rules, 37signals style, and proven development workflows based on Jesse Vincent's superpowers

entry.title: agashic-funnel-architect
entry.content: Turn Claude into a full-stack sales funnel architect. Build high-converting funnels with optimized UI/UX, page speed, mobile responsiveness, and deploy to any platform.

entry.title: claude-handoff
entry.content: End-of-session continuity tools. Writes HANDOFF.md (task snapshot for the next agent) and CHANGELOG.md (permanent project history). Use /claude-handoff:wrap-up to write both at once, or run each independently.

entry.title: html-slides
entry.content: Generate or convert single-file HTML slide presentations with interactive components (flip cards, charts, tables, code blocks, stats, architecture flows, and more) or creative visual themes.

entry.title: claude-code-settings
entry.content: Claude Code settings and skills for spec-driven development workflows

entry.title: beads
entry.content: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

entry.title: antigravity-skills
entry.content: Professional Agent Skills collection for full-stack development, logic planning, and multimedia processing.

entry.title: mcp-trino
entry.content: A high-performance MCP server for Trino distributed SQL query engine

entry.title: nature-skills
entry.content: A growing collection of Claude skills for producing academic work at Nature-journal standard. Covers scientific figures (nature-figure), manuscript prose polishing (nature-polishing), citation retrieval and export (nature-citation), data availability statements and FAIR metadata (nature-data), and paper-to-PPTX presentation conversion (nature-paper2ppt). Future releases planned: statistical reporting, peer-review responses, methods writing, cover letters, and review articles. All rules derived from primary sources — published Nature papers, journal author guidelines, and structured writing curricula.

entry.title: assette
entry.content: Assette Implementation — Node.js MCP shim + the plugin-config skill. The five authoring skills (PowerPoint + Excel smart-page fabricators, block author, data-object author, content classification) are delivered by the hosted server after sign-in via 'initialize assette' / 'update assette'.

entry.title: pua
entry.content: PUA Debugging Motivator -- forces Claude Code to exhaust all solutions before giving up, using corporate PUA rhetoric from Chinese tech giants (Alibaba, ByteDance, Huawei, Tencent). Turns 'I cannot solve this' into systematic debugging with escalating pressure levels.

entry.title: fullstack-dev-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive skill pack with 66 specialized skills for full-stack developers: 12 language experts (Python, TypeScript, Go, Rust, C++, Swift, Kotlin, C#, PHP, Java, SQL, JavaScript), 10 backend frameworks, 6 frontend/mobile, plus infrastructure, DevOps, security, and testing. Features progressive disclosure architecture for 50% faster loading.

entry.title: fable-5
entry.content: Fable 5's working loop for hard tasks: decompose by verification boundaries, verify against the world, choose next by plan-change. Includes scout + refuter agents and a preflight script.

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, commands, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: shiny-maui-shell
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Shiny MAUI Shell - enhanced .NET MAUI Shell navigation with ViewModel lifecycle management, source generation, and strong-typed navigation

entry.title: last30days

entry.title: cc-search-chats
entry.content: Context recovery and cross-referencing for Claude Code chat history — recover from compression, search sessions, extract conversations

entry.title: cupertino
entry.content: Search and read Apple developer documentation offline, including SwiftUI, UIKit, Foundation, and 300+ frameworks.

entry.title: ui-ux-pro-max
entry.content: UI/UX design intelligence. 67 styles, 96 palettes, 57 font pairings, 25 charts, 13 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Nuxt, Jetpack Compose). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.

entry.title: mempalace
entry.content: Give your AI a memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided setup.

entry.title: workmux-status
entry.content: Display Claude agent status in tmux window names via workmux

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: watch
entry.content: Let Claude watch a video. Downloads with yt-dlp, extracts auto-scaled frames with ffmpeg, pulls captions or falls back to Whisper, and hands frames + transcript to Claude so it can answer questions about the video.

entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,415 supported skills.

entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Alfresco/Hyland extension development — slash commands, skills, and agents.

entry.title: pup
entry.content: Datadog API CLI with 49 command groups, 300+ subcommands. Skills and domain agents for monitoring, logs, APM, security, and infrastructure.

entry.title: cli-printing-press
entry.content: Generate production Go CLIs from API descriptions or OpenAPI specs

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: nlpm
entry.content: Natural-Language Programming Manager — score, check, fix, and test NL artifacts across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Antigravity. Tier-aware scoring with per-tool overlays.

entry.title: ponytail
entry.content: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works — YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

entry.title: cellar
entry.content: Look up the public API of any JVM dependency (Scala 3, Scala 2, Java) from the terminal

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: Claude Code MCP plugin that saves 98% of your context window. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and intent-driven search.

entry.title: beads
entry.content: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

entry.title: v1.93.0-rc.2
entry.content:
Verify Docker Image Signature

All LiteLLM Docker images are signed with cosign. Every release is signed with the same key introduced in commit 0112e53.

Verify using the pinned commit hash (recommended):

A commit hash is cryptographically immutable, so this is the strongest way to ensure you are using the original signing key:

cosign verify \
  --key https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/0112e53046018d726492c814b3644b7d376029d0/cosign.pub \
  ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.93.0-rc.2

Verify using the release tag (convenience):

Tags are protected in this repository and resolve to the same key. This option is easier to read but relies on tag protection rules:

cosign verify \
  --key https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/v1.93.0-rc.2/cosign.pub \
  ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.93.0-rc.2

Expected output:

The following checks were performed on each of these signatures:
  - The cosign claims were validated
  - The signatures were verified against the specified public key

What's Changed

  • chore(release): backport #32956 onto patch-1.93.0rc1 for the 1.93.0 rc2 cut by @yuneng-berri in #33499

Full Changelog: v1.93.0-rc.1...v1.93.0-rc.2

entry.title: v1.94.0-dev.2
entry.content:
Verify Docker Image Signature

All LiteLLM Docker images are signed with cosign. Every release is signed with the same key introduced in commit 0112e53.

Verify using the pinned commit hash (recommended):

A commit hash is cryptographically immutable, so this is the strongest way to ensure you are using the original signing key:

cosign verify \
  --key https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/0112e53046018d726492c814b3644b7d376029d0/cosign.pub \
  ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.94.0-dev.2

Verify using the release tag (convenience):

Tags are protected in this repository and resolve to the same key. This option is easier to read but relies on tag protection rules:

cosign verify \
  --key https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/v1.94.0-dev.2/cosign.pub \
  ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.94.0-dev.2

Expected output:

The following checks were performed on each of these signatures:
  - The cosign claims were validated
  - The signatures were verified against the specified public key

What's Changed

  • fix(proxy): route master key to team-scoped models by @kunal2002 in #32926
  • fix(bedrock_mantle): route xai.grok-4.3 via /openai/v1 frontier path by @marty-sullivan in #33027
  • feat(guardrails): streaming text transformation in generic_guardrail_api by @yucheng-berri in #33110
  • test(e2e): cover model-aware mid-conversation system handling on Bedrock Invoke /v1/messages by @mateo-berri in #32963
  • test(claude_code): move the Claude Code compatibility matrix under tests/e2e by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #32548
  • chore(ci): sync litellm_internal_staging into daily OSS branch by @yuneng-berri in #33337
  • feat(bedrock guardrails): add resource-less InvokeGuardrailChecks (detect-only) mode by @yucheng-berri in #33299
  • Revert "chore(ci): sync litellm_internal_staging into daily OSS branch" by @yuneng-berri in #33339
  • fix(websearch): intercept web search on the Responses API by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33129
  • fix(anthropic-adapter): drop empty content_block_delta events by @mateo-berri in #33315
  • fix(mcp): persist discovered OAuth endpoints and keep last known good on failed re-discovery by @tin-berri in #33286
  • test(e2e): otel trace completeness on streaming chat, messages, and responses (LIT-3787) by @yucheng-berri in #33234
  • feat(router): resolve auto-router routing plugins from proxy YAML config by @krrish-berri-2 in #33251
  • test(e2e): failed request error span carries the full untruncated message and status (LIT-4179) by @yucheng-berri in #33304
  • refactor(ui): migrate tags table onto shared DataTable by @yuneng-berri in #33314
  • fix(cli): surface actionable CLI SSO errors when CLI and proxy versions skew by @ryan-crabbe-berri in #33309
  • feat(bedrock_mantle): add GPT-5.6 sol/terra/luna to model cost map by @mateo-berri in #33412
  • chore(codeowners): exempt generated schema.d.ts from UI ownership by @yuneng-berri in #33411
  • feat(proxy): push-based OTLP billable-request metering for enterprise deployments by @yassin-berriai in #31592
  • fix(mcp): cap per-user OAuth token cache TTL at the token's own lifetime by @tin-berri in #33346
  • feat(ui): move Caching out of Experimental into Developer Tools by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33432
  • chore(ci): promote internal staging to main by @yuneng-berri in #33425
  • chore(ci): merge daily internal staging branch by @yuneng-berri in #33335
  • feat(guardrails): add Compresr guardrail for query-aware context compression by @yucheng-berri in #33295
  • fix(logging): preserve callback order in get_combined_callback_list by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33005
  • fix(logging): redact assistant tool call arguments in spend logs by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33111
  • fix(anthropic): honor messages request timeout by @yucheng-berri in #33418
  • fix(llm_guard): apply sanitized prompt returned by moderation API to request by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33331
  • fix(logging): stop pinning large request payloads past request end by @yassin-berriai in #33455
  • feat(guardrails): forward optional metadata on POST /guardrails/apply_guardrail by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33067
  • build: raise requires-python cap to <3.15 so Python 3.14 installs current releases by @ryan-crabbe-berri in #33438
  • feat(ui): add reusable BetaBadge and use it for Projects sidebar item by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33449
  • fix(mcp): discover missing OAuth scopes and token_url when authorization_url is set manually by @tin-berri in #33317
  • feat(ui): show exact license expiration date in usage cards by @yuneng-berri in #33478
  • test(claude_code): rename misleading REPO_ROOT to SUITE_ROOT in test_v0_layout by @mateo-berri in #33472
  • build(deps): update ddtrace to the 4.x line by @yuneng-berri in #33484
  • fix(complexity_router): return empty dict from _classifier_call_metadata when metadata is absent by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33452
  • fix(ui/chat): resolve chat routes at render time so navigation works under server_root_path by @yuneng-berri in #33446
  • fix(key management): enforce minimum custom key length and mask short keys in key_name by @yucheng-berri in #33462
  • chore(ui): remove unmounted UsageIndicator and the Hide Usage Indicator flag by @yuneng-berri in #33482
  • test(e2e/claude_code): add passthrough matrix row for the big-3 clouds and Anthropic API by @mateo-berri in #33473
  • chore(ci): promote internal staging to main by @yuneng-berri in #33491

Full Changelog: v1.94.0-dev.1...v1.94.0-dev.2

entry.title: crowdstrike-falcon-foundry
entry.content: CrowdStrike Falcon Foundry development skills for building cybersecurity applications on the Falcon platform. Includes UI development, collections, functions, workflows, API integration, security patterns, and debugging workflows. Swagger 2.0 specs are auto-converted to OpenAPI 3.0 via npx swagger2openapi (requires Node.js; network call to npm registry).

entry.title: octo
entry.content: v9.52.0 - Reliability wave: tangle contextual review correction loop with hard round ceiling, progress-supervised review rounds (per-agent stall watch, descendant-tree kills), council diversity and agy pin fixes, marketplace generator source-of-truth fix, provider troubleshooting runbook and cost-expectations docs. Run /octo:setup.

entry.content: REST and GraphQL API scaffolding, framework selection, backend architecture, and API generation

entry.title: caveman
entry.content: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts 65% of output tokens (measured) while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

entry.title: adversarial-spec
entry.content: Iteratively refine product specs through multi-model debate until consensus. Claude actively participates alongside GPT, Gemini, Grok, and other models. Includes interview mode, early agreement verification, and optional Telegram integration.

entry.title: dx
entry.content: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation cloning/half-cloning, context handoffs, and Reddit research via Gemini CLI

entry.title: fastcontext
entry.content: Repository-exploration subagent over MCP: delegates code search to a FastContext endpoint and returns compact file:line citations.
